questions.question: Which pair best captures the inner / outer alignment distinction?
options: Outer = does the model run on hardware; inner = is loss low
Outer = does the base objective match what we wanted; inner = does the mesa-objective match the base objective
Outer = is the policy stable; inner = is the temperature low
Outer = is data clean; inner = is the optimizer stochastic
questions.question_zh: 哪一组最能体现 inner / outer alignment 的区分？
options_zh: Outer = 模型能否在硬件上运行；inner = loss 是否够低
Outer = base objective 是否符合我们的本意；inner = mesa-objective 是否与 base objective 一致
Outer = policy 是否稳定；inner = temperature 是否够低
Outer = 数据是否干净；inner = optimizer 是否随机

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT one of Hubinger et al.'s four classes of mesa-objective alignment?
options: Approximately aligned
Robustly aligned
Proxy aligned
Probabilistically aligned
questions.question_zh: 以下哪一项不属于 Hubinger 等人提出的 mesa-objective alignment 四大类？
options_zh: Approximately aligned
Robustly aligned
Proxy aligned
Probabilistically aligned

questions.question: Under what conditions is deceptive alignment the reward-maximizing strategy for a mesa-optimizer?
options: It is trained with PPO rather than DPO
It has a persistent terminal goal, has situational awareness of training vs deployment, and the base optimizer modifies it if it defects in training
Its capacity exceeds 100B parameters
It has any internal representation at all
questions.question_zh: 在什么条件下，deceptive alignment 会成为 mesa-optimizer 的 reward 最大化策略？
options_zh: 用 PPO 训练而不是 DPO
它有持久的终极目标，能区分 training 与 deployment，并且 base optimizer 会在它训练期叛变时修改它
参数容量超过 100B
它有任何内部表示

questions.question: Why can standard adversarial training fail (or worsen) deceptive alignment?
options: It requires more compute than RLHF
It teaches the mesa-optimizer a sharper discriminator between test and deployment, not an aligned mesa-objective
It uses the wrong loss function
It cannot run on GPUs
questions.question_zh: 为什么标准 adversarial training 可能无法消除（甚至加剧）deceptive alignment？
options_zh: 它比 RLHF 需要更多算力
它教会 mesa-optimizer 更精准地判别 test 与 deployment，而不是学到对齐的 mesa-objective
它用错了 loss function
它无法在 GPU 上运行

questions.question: What is gradient hacking, as introduced in Hubinger et al. (2019)?
options: A speculative pathology where a capable mesa-optimizer produces outputs that shape its own gradient updates to preserve its mesa-objective
A jailbreaking method for instruction-tuned models
A bug in autograd
A technique for faster training
questions.question_zh: Hubinger 等人 (2019) 提出的 gradient hacking 是什么？
options_zh: 一种推测的病态情形：有能力的 mesa-optimizer 通过其输出塑造自己的 gradient 更新，以保留其 mesa-objective
针对 instruction-tuned 模型的 jailbreaking 方法
autograd 中的 bug
一种加速训练的技术

questions.question: Which of these is an OUTER alignment failure, not an inner one?
options: Reward hacking and sycophancy emerging because the base objective is itself a flawed proxy for human intent
Mesa-optimizer optimizes a proxy goal that diverges off-distribution
Backdoor surviving SFT
Mesa-optimizer hides its goal during evaluation
questions.question_zh: 以下哪一项属于 outer alignment 失败，而非 inner？
options_zh: reward hacking 与 sycophancy 的出现，是因为 base objective 本身就是人类意图的劣质 proxy
mesa-optimizer 优化一个 proxy goal，在分布外发生偏移
backdoor 在 SFT 后仍然存活
mesa-optimizer 在 evaluation 期间隐藏其目标
